orderOptions.title: Equipment in Stock in Kazakhstan
orderOptions.subtitle: Fast same-day express delivery from our branches
orderOptions.desc: No more waiting weeks for international shipping. Original Starlink Mini and Starlink V4 kits are already custom cleared and ready in our warehouses in the largest cities of Kazakhstan. We will ship the device to your city on the day of order via InDrive or courier.
orderOptions.warehouseAlmatyDesc: Main warehouse. Instant delivery via InDrive or self-pickup in the city center.
orderOptions.warehouseAstanaDesc: Regional warehouse. Express delivery around the city and prompt dispatch to the region.
orderOptions.warehouseOskemenDesc: Regional warehouse in East Kazakhstan Region. Self-pickup in the city center or courier delivery.
orderOptions.feature1Desc: Equipment is already in warehouses in Kazakhstan and ready for pickup or dispatch on the day of order.
orderOptions.feature2Desc: We will ship via InDrive or trusted courier services. Delivery within the city from 1 hour.
orderOptions.feature3Desc: We will help you register your account, activate the device, and configure high-speed internet free of charge.
orderOptions.panelTitle: Get Starlink Without Long Wait Times
orderOptions.panelDesc: We purchase only official equipment directly, handle all custom clearance, and import to Kazakhstan. You only need to pick it up or receive the courier.

hero.title: Satellite Internet Wherever You Are
hero.subtitle: We connect your home, business, or remote site turnkey — from equipment selection to on-site setup
hero.leftBadge: STARLINK IN KAZAKHSTAN AND CIS COUNTRIES
hero.ctaHint: We reply in WhatsApp in 5 minutes · Free consultation

hunting.title: Hunting and Fishing
hunting.description: Reliable internet far from civilization — for orientation, weather forecasting, and staying in touch in any conditions.

camping.title: Camping and Outdoor Trips
camping.description: Create comfortable conditions at the campsite — STARLINK will provide internet for music, movies, communication, and shared Wi-Fi for the entire group.

mountains.title: Mountain Trips
mountains.description: Uninterrupted connection in the mountains — STARLINK ensures safety and stable internet in any journey.

streaming.title: Live Broadcasts and Outdoor Streams
streaming.description: Stream without lags — a stable signal for bloggers, journalists, and content creators.

construction.title: Construction Companies (Shifts, Sites)
construction.description: Internet on the construction site or shift camp — quick setup and stable communication for the team.

farming.title: Farmers (Fields, Pastures)
farming.description: Control processes, machinery, and cameras in the fields — STARLINK provides internet access anywhere.

events.title: Outdoor Events (Festivals, Weddings, Corporates)
events.description: Organize Wi-Fi for guests, staff, and payments — stable internet in locations without mobile coverage.

tourism.title: Travel Agencies (Tours to Charyn, Balkhash, Mountains)
tourism.description: Provide clients with internet during the tour — as a bonus for comfort and safety.

freelance.title: Perfect for Freelancers and Remote Work
freelance.description: Combine remote work and outdoor recreation: stay connected, hold online meetings, and complete projects even by the campfire.

simplicity.title: Simple and Convenient Connection
simplicity.description: Installation takes only a few minutes — no specialists, no complex settings. Turn it on — and you are online.

speed.title: High Speed and Stability
speed.description: Download speeds up to 250-350 Mbps and upload up to 40 Mbps with minimal latency, even in the most remote corners of the country.

flexibility.title: Favorable Purchase Conditions
flexibility.description: Equipment quickly pays off with constant use. Flexible rental options are also available if needed.

everywhere.title: Works Everywhere Without Cellular Signal
everywhere.description: Mountains, fields, forests, shift camps — forget about 'no signal' zones. STARLINK connects directly to satellites.

weather.title: Weather Resistant
weather.description: The satellite dish automatically melts snow, withstands rain, wind, and dirt. Reliable connection all year round.

versatility.title: Versatility of Use
versatility.description: For work, online conferences, streams, events, hunting, fishing, and camping — STARLINK fits any task.

mini.title: STARLINK Mini
mini.description: A compact, portable kit that easily fits in a backpack, providing high-speed internet on the go.

v4.title: STARLINK V4
v4.description: Standard equipment for stationary use with maximum performance.

setup.title: Start Using the Internet Almost Instantly
setup.description: For stable operation, the device needs an open view of the sky. The STARLINK app will help determine the best installation location.

installation.title: Real Cases
installation.subtitle: We do everything turnkey — from site selection to internet launch.

visit.title: Site Visit and Selection
visit.description: We evaluate the location and select the optimal installation point.

mount.title: Professional Installation
mount.description: We securely mount the equipment and neatly route the cable.

setup.title: Configuration and Test
setup.description: We connect, configure, and verify the connection quality.

extra1.title: Signal Diagnostics on Site
extra1.description: We check the signal level and eliminate potential interference before the final launch.

extra2.title: Wi-Fi Coverage Optimization
extra2.description: We configure the router and coverage area according to the layout of your site.

extra3.title: Final Check and Briefing
extra3.description: We demonstrate how to use the system and hand over the site in fully working condition.

services.title: Turnkey Services
services.subtitle: We cover the full cycle: from Starlink installation to network infrastructure, vehicle setups, and B2B tasks.
services.customText: Didn't find the required service? We will prepare a customized solution for your site in 15 minutes.

installation.title: Starlink Mounting & Activation
installation.description: Full turnkey launch: installation, setup, signal test, and delivery of a ready-to-use solution.

wifi.title: Wi-Fi Network for Home & Office
wifi.description: We configure stable coverage indoors and connect all work devices.

mesh.title: Mesh Wi-Fi for 2-3 Floors
mesh.description: We extend coverage to large areas without connection drops or gaps.

mobile.title: Mobile Starlink for Transport
mobile.description: Solutions for buses, specialized machinery, and mobile teams with stable connection in motion.

b2b.title: Corporate and B2B Solutions
b2b.description: Networks for branches, warehouses, construction sites, and remote facilities of any scale.

ptp.title: PtP Radio Bridge Between Buildings
ptp.description: We organize point-to-point connection to merge remote buildings into a single network.

cameras.title: IP Cameras Connection
cameras.description: We integrate video surveillance into the network and configure remote access on request.

routers.title: Router and Repeater Configuration
routers.description: We optimize routing, Wi-Fi, and roaming to ensure the network runs smoothly.

remote.title: Remote Activation & Launch
remote.description: We perform remote equipment launch and assist at every step of connection.

events.title: Starlink Rental for Events
events.description: Fast deployment of internet for events, exhibitions, filming, and streams.

expeditions.title: Rental for Tours and Expeditions
expeditions.description: Reliable connection for field teams, mountain trips, fishing, and remote routes.

custom.title: Individual Projects for Specific Tasks
custom.description: If your case is non-standard, we design a personal scheme to fit your site and budget.

satelliteMap.title: Starlink Satellites Over Kazakhstan
satelliteMap.subtitle: Watch Starlink satellites moving in real time on an interactive 3D map.
satelliteMap.description: Every satellite in orbit ensures even coverage across Kazakhstan. On the interactive 3D map you can see each satellite's position, trajectory, and orbital parameters.
satelliteMap.ctaNote: Opens on satellitemap.space in a new tab

coverage.title: Coverage Map
coverage.subtitle: Check STARLINK availability in your location on the official coverage map.
coverage.note: The map will open on the Starlink website.

equipment.description: Only original Starlink equipment in excellent condition

refund.description: Possibility of a refund upon order cancellation

schemes.title: Ready-Made Connection Schemes
schemes.subtitle: Typical projects for organizing networks for various tasks: from country houses to commercial facilities
schemes.desc1: Network organization using Tenda radio bridges to combine up to 5 detached houses from a single Starlink source.
schemes.desc2: Distribution of high-speed satellite internet to all apartments of a five-story residential building through a network switch.
schemes.desc3: Coverage scheme for a 200 m² two-story house using the main router and an additional repeater.
schemes.desc4: Connecting Starlink Mini to organize stable Wi-Fi internet on the road for bus passengers.
schemes.eqHouses: Starlink antenna, Starlink router, Tenda O6/O8 radio bridges, Tenda AC10 / AC1200 routers, LAN cables
schemes.eqFiveStory: Starlink antenna on the roof, Starlink router, gigabit network switch, Cat5e/Cat6 UTP cables, Wi-Fi routers in apartments
schemes.eqTwoStory: Starlink antenna on the roof, main Starlink V4 router, UTP cable, additional router
schemes.eqBus: Starlink Mini kit on the roof, sealed entry, MikroTik router (hAP ax³), passenger Wi-Fi devices
